name: List Betting Markets for Football
description: Example request and response for listing all available betting markets for football

data.name: Full Game Moneyline
data.description: Bet on which team wins the game outright with no point spread

data.name: Full Game Spread
data.description: Bet on a team to cover the point spread for the entire game

data.name: Full Game Total (Over/Under)
data.description: Bet on whether the combined score will be over or under the posted total

data.name: First Half Moneyline
data.description: Bet on which team leads at halftime

data.name: First Quarter Spread
data.description: Bet on the first quarter point spread

data.name: Player Passing Yards Prop
data.description: Bet over or under on a quarterback's passing yards total
